title: Money can come through ease as well as effort
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for widening the belief about how earning works.
excerpt: A short energy statement for when ease around money feels unfamiliar or suspect. The release names the hard-work rule; the allow opens a different route.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 29 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you feel guilty or suspicious about money that arrived without effort.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 29 of the MONEY program. The release names the hard-work rule; the allow opens room for a different relationship with earning.
I am ready to release the belief that money can only come through hard work and struggle. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow money to come through ease as well as effort. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 29 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is the core method of The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
